title: Lysogeny Broth (LB) (1L)
author: Haven Himmighoefer

steps_raw.instruction: Fill 1 L bottle to 500 mLs. Add 10 g of tryptone, 10 g of sodium chloride, and 5 g of yeast extract. Shake until all reagents are in solution.
Adjust pH to 7 with 5 N NaOH. Once at desired pH fill all the way with water to 1 L.
Autoclave on setting 12 with water in the container to avoid over boiling.
